title: +Seeds
description: This resource pack adds 3D seed textures
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5216904c08768184e46a0a3fdca6c7bf8280672.png)
This extended resource pack significantly increases the amount of 3D content for seeds, providing a vast collection of detailed seed models organized in in-game guides. The project is currently under active development, so bugs and incomplete features may occur. Pommel - Held Item Models and Punchy must be installed.
